privileged_info_summary: Sygic GPS Navigation (com.sygic.aura) supports German language. The task requires changing the interface language from English to German (Deutsch) via Settings > Regional > Language. Verified German UI text includes: Einstellungen (Settings), Karte (Map), Navigation, and Suchen (Search). All metadata claims are accurate. The task operates on synthetic data (Android emulator environment with Sygic app).
